messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Clinical Trial Results' for medical researchers and healthcare professionals. The presentation requires 28 slides using a sterile scientific theme featuring grid lines and data tables. Write all content in English and configure the slide size to 16:9 Widescreen orientation. Save the final file as trial_results.pptx. You are strictly prohibited from using external APIs or web scraping. For any charts included, you must use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Also, ensure that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


# ── Deck Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(5.625)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)

NAVY = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x3A, 0x5C)
TEAL = RGBColor(0x2E, 0x86, 0xAB)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF4, 0xF6, 0xF9)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x34, 0x36)
ACCENT_RED = RGBColor(0xE7, 0x4C, 0x3C)
ACCENT_GREEN = RGBColor(0x27, 0xAE, 0x60)
GRID_LINE = RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
SUBTLE_GRAY = RGBColor(0xEC, 0xF0, 0xF1)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color=WHITE):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_title_bar(slide, title_text, subtitle_text=None):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.15), SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(1), Inches(0.7))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.2), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4), title_text, font_size=20, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    if subtitle_text:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.45), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.3), subtitle_text, font_size=11, color=RGBColor(0xBB, 0xCC, 0xDD))


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title=None, body_text="", bg_color=CARD_BG):
    card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    card.fill.solid()
    card.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    card.line.color.rgb = GRID_LINE
    card.line.width = Pt(1)

    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.08), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.25), title, font_size=11, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    if body_text:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.35), width - Inches(0.3), height - Inches(0.45), body_text, font_size=9, color=DARK_TEXT)


def add_data_table(slide, left, top, rows, cols, data_list):
    table_shape = slide.shapes.add_table(rows, cols, left, top, Inches(8), Inches(3))
    table = table_shape.table

    for i in range(rows):
        for j in range(cols):
            cell = table.cell(i, j)
            cell.text = str(data_list[i][j]) if i < len(data_list) and j < len(data_list[i]) else ""
            for paragraph in cell.text_frame.paragraphs:
                paragraph.font.size = Pt(9)
                paragraph.font.name = "Calibri"
                paragraph.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
                if i == 0:
                    paragraph.font.bold = True
                    paragraph.font.color.rgb = WHITE
            if i == 0:
                cell.fill.solid()
                cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
            elif i % 2 == 0:
                cell.fill.solid()
                cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = SUBTLE_GRAY

    return table_shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.1), Inches(5.35), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.2), label_text, font_size=7, color=GRID_LINE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_footer(slide, text="CONFIDENTIAL | Clinical Trial Results"):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(5.35), Inches(4), Inches(0.2), text, font_size=7, color=GRID_LINE)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = SUBTLE_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = GRID_LINE
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.4), "Image Placeholder", font_size=9, color=GRID_LINE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_1_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(9), Inches(1), "Clinical Trial Results", font_size=36, bold=True, color=NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.5), "Phase III Randomized Controlled Study — Efficacy and Safety Analysis", font_size=16, color=TEAL, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.8), Inches(3.2), Inches(2.4), Inches(0.05))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "Study Protocol: CT-2024-017\nPrincipal Investigator: Dr. Sarah Mitchell, MD, PhD\nInstitution: National Center for Clinical Research", font_size=12, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide)


def slide_2_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_GRAY)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Executive Summary", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    cards_data = [
        ("Study Population", "N = 1,247 patients\nRandomized 2:1 (Treatment vs Placebo)", Inches(0.5), Inches(0.8)),
        ("Primary Endpoint", "Met with p < 0.001\nSignificant improvement in clinical response rate", Inches(3.6), Inches(0.8)),
        ("Safety Profile", "Well-tolerated overall\nAEs comparable to placebo group", Inches(6.7), Inches(0.8)),
    ]
    for title, body, left, top in cards_data:
        add_card(slide, left, top, Inches(2.9), Inches(1.5), title, body)

    summary_text = "This Phase III trial evaluated the efficacy and safety of investigational therapy CT-017 versus placebo in patients with moderate-to-severe condition. The study met its primary endpoint with statistically significant improvement across all secondary endpoints."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.6), Inches(9), Inches(1.8), "Key Findings", summary_text)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 2")


def slide_3_study_design(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Study Design & Methodology"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Study Design & Methodology", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    design_items = [
        ("Design Type", "Multicenter, randomized,\ndouble-blind, placebo-controlled"),
        ("Duration", "52 weeks treatment\n+ 16-week follow-up"),
        ("Randomization", "Computer-generated,\nstratified by site and severity"),
        ("Blinding", "Double-dummy technique\nfor both arms"),
    ]
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(design_items):
        left = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.3)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(0.8), Inches(2.1), Inches(1.6), title, body)

    criteria_text = "Inclusion Criteria: Adults aged 18-75 with confirmed diagnosis; moderate-to-severe disease severity (score ≥ 4). Exclusion Criteria: Pregnancy; concurrent immunosuppressive therapy; history of severe hypersensitivity to study drug."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.6), Inches(9), Inches(1.3), "Eligibility Criteria", criteria_text)

    flow_items = ["Screening (N=1,847)", "Randomized (N=1,247)", "Treatment (52 wks)", "Follow-up (16 wks)"]
    for i, item in enumerate(flow_items):
        left = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.3)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(4.1), Inches(2.1), Inches(0.8), "", item)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 3")


def slide_4_demographics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Patient Demographics"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Patient Demographics", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    data = [
        ["Characteristic", "Treatment (N=831)", "Placebo (N=416)", "Total (N=1,247)"],
        ["Age (years), mean ± SD", "54.2 ± 12.3", "53.8 ± 11.9", "54.1 ± 12.1"],
        ["Female, n (%)", "462 (55.6%)", "227 (54.6%)", "689 (55.3%)"],
        ["White, n (%)", "610 (73.4%)", "301 (72.4%)", "911 (73.1%)"],
        ["Asian, n (%)", "142 (17.1%)", "75 (18.0%)", "217 (17.4%)"],
        ["Black, n (%)", "63 (7.6%)", "31 (7.5%)", "94 (7.5%)"],
        ["Other, n (%)", "16 (1.9%)", "9 (2.2%)", "25 (2.0%)"],
        ["Disease Duration (yrs)", "6.8 ± 3.4", "6.5 ± 3.1", "6.7 ± 3.3"],
    ]
    add_data_table(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.7), len(data), len(data[0]), data)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 4")


def slide_5_primary_endpoint(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Primary Endpoint Results"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Primary Endpoint Results", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Week 12", "Week 24", "Week 36", "Week 52"]
    chart_data.add_series("Treatment (N=831)", (72.4, 78.9, 81.3, 84.1))
    chart_data.add_series("Placebo (N=416)", (34.2, 38.5, 40.1, 42.8))

    left = Inches(0.5)
    top = Inches(0.7)
    width = Inches(6.5)
    height = Inches(3.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_1 = plot.series[0]
    series_1.format.fill.solid()
    series_1.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL
    series_2 = plot.series[1]
    series_2.format.fill.solid()
    series_2.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = GRID_LINE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.3), Inches(0.8), Inches(2.5), Inches(1.5), "Primary Endpoint:\nClinical Response Rate\n\nTreatment vs Placebo\np < 0.001", font_size=11, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 5")


def slide_6_secondary_endpoints(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Secondary Endpoints"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Secondary Endpoints", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    endpoints = [
        ("Disease Activity Score", "DAS-28 reduction\nTreatment: -3.2 ± 1.1 vs Placebo: -1.4 ± 0.9\np < 0.001"),
        ("Patient Global Assessment", "PGA change (VAS)\nTreatment: -45mm vs Placebo: -18mm\np < 0.001"),
        ("Physician Global Assessment", "PGI change (VAS)\nTreatment: -42mm vs Placebo: -16mm\np < 0.001"),
        ("Tender Joint Count", "TJC-28 reduction\nTreatment: -8.4 ± 3.2 vs Placebo: -3.1 ± 2.7\np < 0.001"),
        ("Swollen Joint Count", "SJC-66 reduction\nTreatment: -5.6 ± 2.8 vs Placebo: -2.0 ± 2.1\np < 0.001"),
        ("CRP Reduction (mg/L)", "Median CRP change\nTreatment: -4.2 vs Placebo: -1.1\np < 0.001"),
    ]
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(endpoints):
        row = i // 3
        col = i % 3
        left = Inches(0.5 + col * 3.2)
        top = Inches(0.7 + row * 1.8)
        add_card(slide, left, top, Inches(3.0), Inches(1.6), title, body)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 6")


def slide_7_efficacy_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Efficacy Analysis Over Time"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Efficacy Analysis Over Time", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Baseline", "Week 4", "Week 8", "Week 12", "Week 16", "Week 20", "Week 24"]
    chart_data.add_series("Treatment Group", [5.8, 3.9, 2.8, 2.1, 1.7, 1.5, 1.3])
    chart_data.add_series("Placebo Group", [5.7, 5.0, 4.6, 4.2, 4.0, 3.9, 3.8])

    left = Inches(0.5)
    top = Inches(0.7)
    width = Inches(6.5)
    height = Inches(3.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_1 = plot.series[0]
    series_1.format.line.color.rgb = TEAL
    series_2 = plot.series[1]
    series_2.format.line.color.rgb = GRID_LINE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.3), Inches(0.8), Inches(2.5), Inches(1.5), "Disease Activity Score\n(DAS-28) Over 24 Weeks\n\nTreatment showed sustained\nefficacy throughout the study period", font_size=11, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 7")


def slide_8_safety_profile(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Safety Profile Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Safety Profile Overview", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    safety_items = [
        ("Overall AE Rate", "Treatment: 68.3%\nPlacebo: 61.7%", TEAL),
        ("Serious AEs", "Treatment: 4.2%\nPlacebo: 3.8%", ACCENT_RED),
        ("AEs Leading to Discontinuation", "Treatment: 5.1%\nPlacebo: 4.6%", ACCENT_RED),
        ("Most Common AE (≥5%)", "Headache, Nausea,\nUpper Respiratory Infection", TEAL),
    ]
    for i, (title, body, color) in enumerate(safety_items):
        left = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.3)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(0.7), Inches(2.1), Inches(1.8), title, body, bg_color=LIGHT_GRAY if "Serious" not in title else RGBColor(0xFD, 0xED, 0xEC))

    summary = "The safety profile of CT-017 was consistent with the known pharmacological properties. No new safety signals were identified during the study period."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(9), Inches(1.3), "Safety Summary", summary)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 8")


def slide_9_sae_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Serious Adverse Events Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Serious Adverse Events Summary", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    data = [
        ["System Organ Class", "Treatment (N=831)", "Placebo (N=416)"],
        ["Infections and Infestations", "18 (2.2%)", "9 (2.2%)"],
        ["Gastrointestinal Disorders", "12 (1.4%)", "7 (1.7%)"],
        ["Musculoskeletal Disorders", "8 (1.0%)", "5 (1.2%)"],
        ["Nervous System Disorders", "6 (0.7%)", "3 (0.7%)"],
        ["Cardiac Disorders", "4 (0.5%)", "2 (0.5%)"],
        ["Respiratory Disorders", "3 (0.4%)", "1 (0.2%)"],
        ["Total SAEs", "51 (6.1%)", "27 (6.5%)"],
    ]
    add_data_table(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.7), len(data), len(data[0]), data)

    note = "Note: No causal relationship between study drug and SAEs was established in the majority of cases."
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.3), note, font_size=9, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 9")


def slide_10_laboratory_values(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Laboratory Values Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Laboratory Values Overview", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    labs = [
        ("Hemoglobin (g/dL)", "13.8 → 13.6\nMean Change: -0.2"),
        ("WBC Count (×10⁹/L)", "7.2 → 7.4\nMean Change: +0.2"),
        ("ALT (U/L)", "25 → 28\nMean Change: +3"),
        ("Creatinine (mg/dL)", "0.9 → 0.91\nMean Change: +0.01"),
        ("CRP (mg/L)", "4.8 → 2.1\nMean Change: -2.7"),
        ("ESR (mm/hr)", "38 → 22\nMean Change: -16"),
    ]
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(labs):
        row = i // 3
        col = i % 3
        left = Inches(0.5 + col * 3.2)
        top = Inches(0.7 + row * 1.8)
        add_card(slide, left, top, Inches(3.0), Inches(1.6), title, body)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 10")


def slide_11_vital_signs(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Vital Signs Changes"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Vital Signs Changes", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    vitals = [
        ("Systolic BP (mmHg)", "132 → 130\nMean Change: -2"),
        ("Diastolic BP (mmHg)", "84 → 83\nMean Change: -1"),
        ("Heart Rate (bpm)", "76 → 75\nMean Change: -1"),
        ("Temperature (°C)", "36.8 → 36.9\nMean Change: +0.1"),
        ("Respiratory Rate", "16 → 16\nNo Significant Change"),
        ("SpO₂ (%)", "97 → 97\nStable Throughout"),
    ]
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(vitals):
        row = i // 3
        col = i % 3
        left = Inches(0.5 + col * 3.2)
        top = Inches(0.7 + row * 1.8)
        add_card(slide, left, top, Inches(3.0), Inches(1.6), title, body)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 11")


def slide_12_subgroup_analysis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Subgroup Analysis — Efficacy"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Subgroup Analysis — Efficacy", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Age < 50", "Age ≥ 50", "Female", "Male", "Baseline Severity Low", "Baseline Severity High"]
    chart_data.add_series("Treatment Effect (OR)", [1.8, 2.1, 1.9, 2.0, 1.6, 2.4])

    left = Inches(0.5)
    top = Inches(0.7)
    width = Inches(6.5)
    height = Inches(3.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_1 = plot.series[0]
    series_1.format.fill.solid()
    series_1.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.3), Inches(0.8), Inches(2.5), Inches(1.5), "Subgroup Analysis\nConsistent treatment effect\nacross all pre-specified\nsubgroups (p-heterogeneity > 0.05)", font_size=11, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 12")


def slide_13_pharmacokinetics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Pharmacokinetic Parameters"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Pharmacokinetic Parameters", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    data = [
        ["Parameter", "Cmax (ng/mL)", "Tmax (hrs)", "AUC₀₋₂₄ (ng·hr/mL)", "t½ (hrs)"],
        ["Day 1 (N=48)", "24.6 ± 5.3", "2.1 ± 0.8", "187.4 ± 32.1", "14.2 ± 3.6"],
        ["Week 12 (N=45)", "26.1 ± 5.8", "2.3 ± 0.9", "195.8 ± 35.4", "14.8 ± 3.9"],
        ["Steady State", "27.3 ± 6.1", "2.4 ± 0.7", "201.2 ± 38.7", "15.1 ± 4.1"],
    ]
    add_data_table(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.7), len(data), len(data[0]), data)

    pk_text = "Pharmacokinetic parameters demonstrated linear accumulation with no evidence of time-dependent changes in clearance or bioavailability over the 12-week treatment period."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(9), Inches(1.0), "PK Summary", pk_text)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 13")

def slide_16_statistical_methods(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Statistical Methods"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Statistical Methods", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    methods = [
        ("Primary Analysis", "Mixed Model for Repeated Measures (MMRM)\nwith treatment, visit, and interaction terms"),
        ("Secondary Endpoints", "ANCOVA with baseline as covariate\nand stratification factors included"),
        ("Safety Analysis", "Descriptive statistics\nFisher's exact test for categorical AEs"),
        ("Subgroup Analysis", "Interaction tests in MMRM model\nNo multiplicity adjustment applied"),
    ]
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(methods):
        left = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.3)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(0.7), Inches(2.1), Inches(2.8), title, body)

    alpha_text = "Statistical significance was defined as two-sided p-value < 0.05. All analyses were performed on the Intent-to-Treat (ITT) population using LOCF imputation for missing data."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(9), Inches(1.2), "Analysis Population", alpha_text)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 16")

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(milestones):

    long_term_text = "Of the 831 patients in the treatment arm, 742 (89.3%) completed the 52-week treatment period and entered the follow-up phase. Long-term safety data confirmed no new adverse events beyond the initial study period."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.6), Inches(9), Inches(1.4), "Follow-up Completion", long_term_text)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.7), Inches(4.2), Inches(3.8), "Study Limitations", "\n".join(limitations[0][1]))

    ]
    add_card(slide, Inches(4.9), Inches(0.7), Inches(4.6), Inches(3.8), "Future Research Directions", "\n".join(future[0][1]))

def slide_28_conclusion(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Conclusion"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Conclusion", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.8), Inches(1.0), Inches(2.4), Inches(0.05))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL

    conclusion_text = "The Phase III clinical trial CT-2024-017 has demonstrated that CT-017 is both effective and well-tolerated in patients with moderate-to-severe disease. The study met its primary endpoint of clinical response rate at Week 52 (84.1% vs 42.8%, p < 0.001) and showed consistent efficacy across all secondary endpoints."
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.3), Inches(8.6), Inches(1.5), conclusion_text, font_size=13, color=DARK_TEXT)

    takeaway = "CT-017 represents a significant advancement in therapeutic options for this patient population and warrants regulatory consideration."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.0), Inches(8.6), Inches(1.2), "Key Takeaway", takeaway)

    refs_text = "References: 1. Smith et al., NEJM 2024; 2. Johnson et al., Lancet 2023; 3. FDA Review Document CT-017-RD-001"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(4.5), Inches(8.6), Inches(0.5), refs_text, font_size=9, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide)


# ── Main Function ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_1_title(prs)
    slide_2_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_3_study_design(prs)
    slide_4_demographics(prs)
    slide_5_primary_endpoint(prs)
    slide_6_secondary_endpoints(prs)
    slide_7_efficacy_analysis(prs)
    slide_8_safety_profile(prs)
    slide_9_sae_summary(prs)
    slide_10_laboratory_values(prs)
    slide_11_vital_signs(prs)
    slide_12_subgroup_analysis(prs)
    slide_13_pharmacokinetics(prs)
    slide_14_dose_response(prs)
    slide_15_time_to_event(prs)
    slide_16_statistical_methods(prs)
    slide_17_confidence_intervals(prs)
    slide_18_forest_plot(prs)
    slide_19_treatment_comparison(prs)
    slide_20_ae_frequency(prs)
    slide_21_concomitant_medications(prs)
    slide_22_quality_of_life(prs)
    slide_23_biomarker_correlations(prs)
    slide_24_long_term_followup(prs)
    slide_25_meta_analysis(prs)
    slide_26_clinical_implications(prs)
    slide_27_limitations(prs)
    slide_28_conclusion(prs)

    prs.save("trial_results.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
